introSection: Boomerang Challenge Coaster is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Trans Studio Bali in Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster originally opened on 27 May 1993 at Pleasure Island Family Theme Park, where it operated as Boomerang. It operated until the park's closure on 29 October 2016, after which it would be dismantled and shipped to Indonesia. It was eventually reopened on 19 December 2019 at Trans Studio Bali in Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia. It is now situated on the roof of the Trans Studio Mall.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and black supports, the ride used to have white track and green supports when operating at Pleasure Island.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains were replaced when the ride reopened at Trans Studio Bali, the ride now operates with new Vekoma build trains.

fullText:
Boomerang Challenge Coaster is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Trans Studio Bali in Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia.

The coaster originally opened on 27 May 1993 at Pleasure Island Family Theme Park, where it operated as Boomerang. It operated until the park's closure on 29 October 2016, after which it would be dismantled and shipped to Indonesia. It was eventually reopened on 19 December 2019 at Trans Studio Bali in Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia. It is now situated on the roof of the Trans Studio Mall.



Yellow track and black supports, the ride used to have white track and green supports when operating at Pleasure Island.

The trains were replaced when the ride reopened at Trans Studio Bali, the ride now operates with new Vekoma build trains.
